flow_pill.name: Flow Meridian Pill
flow_pill.description: Shaves **10 min** off your next adventure cooldown.

meridian_surge_pill.name: Meridian Surge Pill
meridian_surge_pill.description: Shaves **7 min** off your next **2** cultivate cooldowns.

gatebreaker_dust.name: Gatebreaker Dust
gatebreaker_dust.description: Shaves **30 min** off your next dungeon cooldown.

void_pulse_pill.name: Void Pulse Pill
void_pulse_pill.description: One dose shaves time off **cultivate, adventure, dungeon, and duel** cooldowns.

qi_gathering_pill.name: Qi Gathering Pill
qi_gathering_pill.description: Boosts qi from your next **3** cultivations.

clarity_pill.name: Clarity Pill
clarity_pill.description: Steadies the mind for **+14%** breakthrough stability per charge — all charges apply on your next **`/breakthrough`**.

swiftwind_pill.name: Swiftwind Pill
swiftwind_pill.description: Improves success on your next adventure run.

tempering_pill.name: Tempering Pill
tempering_pill.description: Hardens the body for one adventure or dungeon.

affix_stone.name: Affix Stone
affix_stone.description: Imprint a random affix onto forged gear (`/affix`).

blank_scroll.name: Blank Scroll
blank_scroll.description: Unmarked parchment for binding technique manuals (`/craft manual`).

shop_spirit_blade.name: Spirit Blade
shop_spirit_blade.description: Shop-forged weapon — modest Power for adventures and duels.

shop_mistwoven_vest.name: Mistwoven Vest
shop_mistwoven_vest.description: Shop-forged armor — solid Defense for risky areas.

shop_bandit_talisman.name: Bandit's Talisman
shop_bandit_talisman.description: Shop charm — a little Fortune for better drops.

shop_moonwell_pendant.name: Moonwell Pendant
shop_moonwell_pendant.description: Shop focus — balanced stats with extra Insight.

shop_manual_swift_slash.name: Technique Pamphlet: Swift Slash
shop_manual_swift_slash.description: A basic sword manual sold at frontier markets.

shop_manual_ember_palm.name: Technique Pamphlet: Ember Palm
shop_manual_ember_palm.description: A common fire palm manual for new cultivators.

shop_unidentified_scroll.name: Unidentified Scroll
shop_unidentified_scroll.description: A sealed scroll — reveals a random technique manual on purchase.
